message:
fix: downgrade early communicate(result) instead of rejecting

gpt-5.3-codex stops entirely when communicate(result) returns an
error. Changed approach: downgrade the call to status and return a
verification_required challenge in the tool response. This keeps the
model running while informing it that submission was not accepted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
